# Apache Parquet Geospatial Fixtures

These files are copied from Apache `parquet-testing/data/geospatial` and are
used to verify native Parquet `GEOMETRY` / `GEOGRAPHY` logical type support.

Source repository:
https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/tree/master/data/geospatial

Files:

- `geospatial.parquet`
- `crs-geography.parquet`
- `crs-srid.parquet`

License: Apache-2.0, matching the upstream Apache Parquet testing repository.
